heading: Transfers of functions and activities
label: 1531 Transfers of functions and activities
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised SectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1531(a), (b)31:581c(a)(1st sentence), (b)(1st sentence)., .Sept. 12, 1950, ch. 946, § 20264 Stat. 8381531(c), (d)31:581c(a)(last sentence), (b)(last sentence).In subsections (a) and (b), the defined term “executive agency” in section 102 of the revised title is substituted for “department or establishment” for consistency and clarity.In subsection (a), the words “organizational unit or agency” are substituted for “agency”, and the word “appropriation” is substituted for “said funds”, for consistency and clarity.Subsection (d) is substituted for “which are hereby authorized to be established” because of the restatement.

Prohibition on Transfer of Funds to Other Departments and Agencies, , , provided that funds available for military functions of Department of Defense could not be made available to any other department or agency of Federal Government pursuant to a provision of law enacted after , unless, not less than 30 days before such funds were made available to such other department or agency, Secretary of Defense submitted to congressional defense committees a report describing effect on military preparedness of making such funds available to such department or agency, prior to repeal and restatement in , Armed Forces, by , (b), , .Pub. Prohibition on Transfer of Funds to Other Departments and Agencies, , , provided that funds available for military functions of Department of Defense could not be made available to any other department or agency of Federal Government pursuant to a provision of law enacted after , unless, not less than 30 days before such funds were made available to such other department or agency, Secretary of Defense submitted to congressional defense committees a report describing effect on military preparedness of making such funds available to such department or agency, prior to repeal and restatement in , Armed Forces, by , (b), , .Pub. L. 101–189, div. A, title XVI, § 1604103 Stat. 1598section 2215 of Title 10Pub. L. 103–160, div. A, title XI, § 1106(a)(1)107 Stat. 1750Nov. 29, 1989Nov. 29, 1989Nov. 30, 1993

children.text: by the organizational unit or agency to which the function or activity was transferred or assigned; and
for a purpose for which the appropriation was originally available.

children.label: b
children.text: The head of the executive agency determines the amount that, with the approval of the President, is necessary to be transferred when the transfer or assignment of the function or activity is within the agency. The President determines the amount necessary to be transferred when the transfer or assignment of the function or activity is from one executive agency to another.
credited to an applicable existing or new appropriation account;
merged with the amount in an account to which the balance is credited; and
with the amount with which the balance is merged, accounted for as one amount.

children.label: d
children.text: New appropriation accounts may be established to carry out subsection (c)(1) of this section.
